topic: My sprinklers run during the rain, and the water they spray is warm.
title: My Sprinklers Run in the Rain | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My sprinklers ran during the rain, and the water they sprayed was warm.
scenes.image_prompt: Lawn sprinklers spraying across a yard in heavy rain at dusk, misty haze, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I bought the house with the system already buried.
scenes.image_prompt: A wide green lawn before a quiet house under gray storm clouds, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I had never once turned them on.
scenes.image_prompt: A rusted sprinkler control box on a garage wall, switches off, dim light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: They started every night at three, rain or dry.
scenes.image_prompt: Sprinkler heads rising from a dark wet lawn at night, faint streetlight glow, fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The water steamed in the cold air.
scenes.image_prompt: Faint steam rising from sprinkler spray over a dark lawn at night, dim haze, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I cupped it in my hands. It was warm as breath.
scenes.image_prompt: Two cupped hands catching sprinkler water on a dark lawn, faint glow, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I shut the main valve and capped every head.
scenes.image_prompt: A capped sprinkler head and a closed valve in dim soil, flashlight glow, shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: At three they rose through the caps and ran anyway.
scenes.image_prompt: Sprinklers spraying over a dark lawn despite capped fittings, night, misty haze, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The grass where they sprayed grew thick and far too green.
scenes.image_prompt: A patch of unnaturally lush dark green grass on a dim lawn at dusk, fog, shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Beneath that grass the soil was soft, and shaped like a person.
scenes.image_prompt: A faint human shaped depression in soft dark soil beneath thick grass, dim light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I never dug there. I water it now myself.
scenes.image_prompt: A hose laid across a dark green lawn patch at dusk, low light, long shadows, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: On warm nights I hear the spray whisper my own name.
scenes.image_prompt: Sprinklers misting over a dark lawn under faint moonlight, heavy haze, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing
